description: Pick the right number and handle the call correctly

A.title: Police are on their way! 👮
A.description: You called the right number, gave your name and location. The police are coming.

B.title: Ambulance dispatched! 🚑
B.description: You called 155, described the situation clearly. Help is on the way.

C.title: Fire brigade on the way! 🚒
C.description: You called 150, gave your address first. Firefighters are coming.

D.title: All services alerted! 🆘
D.description: 112 connected you to everything at once. Perfect call in a complex emergency.

E.title: City police notified! 🚔
E.description: 156 was exactly right for this local dispute. Well handled.

scenarios.situation: 🎒 You are on tram 4 in Bratislava. Someone just snatched your bag and ran off at the last stop.
scenarios.situationTranslation: Your bag was stolen on the tram. You need to report it.

112.response: Tu je linka 112. Aký je váš problém?
112.responseTranslation: This is line 112. What is your problem?
112.note: 112 works but redirects — 158 is faster for theft

155.response: Tu je záchranná služba. Niekto je zranený?
155.responseTranslation: This is the ambulance service. Is someone injured?
155.redirect: Nie, ukradli mi tašku. Potrebujem políciu.
155.redirectTranslation: No, my bag was stolen. I need the police.
155.note: Wrong number — ambulance is for medical emergencies

150.response: Tu sú hasiči. Je niekde požiar?
150.responseTranslation: This is the fire brigade. Is there a fire somewhere?
150.redirect: Prepáčte, mýlil som sa. Zlodej mi ukradol tašku.
150.redirectTranslation: Sorry, I made a mistake. A thief stole my bag.
150.note: Wrong number — fire brigade handles fires, not theft

156.response: Mestská polícia, dobrý deň. Parkujete na zlom mieste?
156.responseTranslation: City police, good day. Are you parked in the wrong place?
156.redirect: Nie, nie — ukradli mi tašku na električke!
156.redirectTranslation: No, no — my bag was stolen on the tram!
156.note: Wrong number — city police handles local disputes, not crime

scenarios.situation: 🤕 You are walking on Obchodná ulica. A cyclist crashed into a pedestrian. The pedestrian is on the ground and not moving.
scenarios.situationTranslation: Someone is injured on the street and needs medical help urgently.

112.response: Tu je linka 112. Aký je váš problém?
112.responseTranslation: This is line 112. What is your problem?
112.note: 112 works — but 155 is the direct medical line

158.response: Polícia, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
158.redirect: Prepáčte — niekto je zranený na ulici. Potrebujem záchranku!
158.redirectTranslation: Sorry — someone is injured on the street. I need an ambulance!
158.note: Wrong number — police handles crime, not medical emergencies

150.response: Tu sú hasiči. Je niekde požiar?
150.responseTranslation: This is the fire brigade. Is there a fire somewhere?
150.redirect: Nie, nie požiar — niekto je zranený! Potrebujem záchranku!
150.redirectTranslation: No, not fire — someone is injured! I need an ambulance!
150.note: Wrong number — fire brigade handles fires and rescues, not medical emergencies

156.redirect: Prepáčte — niekto je zranený na Obchodnej! Zavolajte záchranku!
156.redirectTranslation: Sorry — someone is injured on Obchodná! Call an ambulance!
156.note: Wrong number — city police handles local disputes, not medical emergencies

scenarios.situation: 🔥 You smell smoke in your apartment building. You open the stairwell door and see flames coming from the apartment on the second floor.
scenarios.situationTranslation: There is a fire in your building. You need the fire brigade immediately.

112.response: Tu je linka 112. Aký je váš problém?
112.responseTranslation: This is line 112. What is your problem?
112.note: 112 works — but 150 is the direct fire brigade line

158.response: Polícia, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
158.redirect: Prepáčte, mýlil som sa — je tu požiar! Potrebujem hasičov!
158.redirectTranslation: Sorry, I made a mistake — there is a fire! I need the fire brigade!
158.note: Wrong number — police handles crime, not fires

155.response: Tu je záchranná služba. Niekto je zranený?
155.responseTranslation: This is the ambulance service. Is someone injured?
155.redirect: Je tu požiar! Potrebujem hasičov, nie záchranku!
155.redirectTranslation: There is a fire! I need the fire brigade, not an ambulance!
155.note: Wrong number — ambulance handles medical emergencies, not fires

156.redirect: Je tu požiar v budove! Zavolajte hasičov — 150!
156.redirectTranslation: There is a fire in the building! Call the fire brigade — 150!
156.note: Wrong number — city police handles local disputes, not fires

scenarios.situation: 💥 You witness a serious car crash on the highway. One car is on fire, there are injured people inside, and traffic is blocked. It is chaos.
scenarios.situationTranslation: Multiple services needed at once — fire, medical, and police. One number can do it all.

158.response: Polícia, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
158.redirect: Nehoda na diaľnici — auto horí a sú tu zranení! Potrebujem aj záchranku aj hasičov!
158.redirectTranslation: Accident on the highway — a car is on fire and there are injured people! I need both ambulance and fire brigade!
158.note: Police alone is not enough — 112 dispatches all services at once

155.response: Tu je záchranná služba. Niekto je zranený?
155.responseTranslation: This is the ambulance service. Is someone injured?
155.redirect: Áno, ale aj auto horí! Potrebujem hasičov aj políciu. Volám 112!
155.redirectTranslation: Yes, but a car is also on fire! I need fire brigade and police too. Calling 112!
155.note: Ambulance alone is not enough for a multi-service emergency

150.response: Tu sú hasiči. Je niekde požiar?
150.responseTranslation: This is the fire brigade. Is there a fire somewhere?
150.redirect: Áno, ale sú tu aj zranení! Potrebujem záchranku aj políciu. Volám 112!
150.redirectTranslation: Yes, but there are also injured people! I need ambulance and police too. Calling 112!
150.note: Fire brigade alone is not enough — 112 handles everything at once

156.redirect: Prepáčte — veľká nehoda na diaľnici! Potrebujem 112 — všetky záchranné zložky!
156.redirectTranslation: Sorry — big accident on the highway! I need 112 — all emergency services!
156.note: City police handles local disputes only — 112 is the right call here

scenarios.situation: 🚗 Your neighbor's car is blocking the entrance to your building for 3 hours. You knocked on their door — no answer. The building manager is away.
scenarios.situationTranslation: A car is blocking your building entrance. This is a local dispute — not a crime emergency.

158.response: Polícia, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo? Niekto je zranený?
158.responseTranslation: Police, good day. What happened? Is someone injured?
158.redirect: Nie, nie — auto blokuje vjazd do budovy. Povedali mi volať mestskú políciu.
158.redirectTranslation: No, no — a car is blocking the building entrance. I was told to call city police.
158.note: National police handles crimes — parking disputes go to 156 city police

155.response: Tu je záchranná služba. Niekto je zranený?
155.responseTranslation: This is the ambulance service. Is someone injured?
155.redirect: Nie, nikto nie je zranený. Auto blokuje vjazd. Prepáčte, volám mestskú políciu.
155.redirectTranslation: No, nobody is injured. A car is blocking the entrance. Sorry, I'll call city police.
155.note: Ambulance is for medical emergencies only

150.response: Tu sú hasiči. Je niekde požiar?
150.responseTranslation: This is the fire brigade. Is there a fire somewhere?
150.redirect: Nie, nie je tu požiar. Auto blokuje cestu. Prepáčte, mýlil som sa.
150.redirectTranslation: No, there is no fire. A car is blocking the road. Sorry, I made a mistake.
150.note: Fire brigade handles fires and rescues — not parking

112.response: Tu je linka 112. Aký je váš problém?
112.responseTranslation: This is line 112. What is your problem?
112.redirect: Auto blokuje vjazd... Presmerovali ma na mestskú políciu — 156.
112.redirectTranslation: A car is blocking the entrance... They redirected me to city police — 156.
112.note: 112 will redirect parking disputes to city police anyway — call 156 directly

theft-158.speaker: dispatcher
theft-158.text: Polícia, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
theft-158.wrongAnswerResponse: Prepáčte — čo sa stalo? Ukradli vám niečo?
theft-158.wrongAnswerTranslation: Sorry — what happened? Was something stolen from you?

choices.text: Dobrý deň. Ukradli mi tašku na električke!
choices.translation: Good day. My bag was stolen on the tram!
Help! Thief! They stole my wallet!
Good day. There is a fire here!

theft-158.speaker: dispatcher
theft-158.text: Rozumiem. Ako sa voláte a kde ste teraz?
theft-158.translation: I understand. What is your name and where are you now?
theft-158.wrongAnswerResponse: Potrebujem vaše meno a polohu — nie lekára. Kde ste?
theft-158.wrongAnswerTranslation: I need your name and location — not a doctor. Where are you?

choices.text: Volám sa Jana. Som na zastávke Obchodná.
choices.translation: My name is Jana. I am at the Obchodná stop.

choices.text: Volám sa Peter. Som na Hlavnej ulici.
choices.translation: My name is Peter. I am on Hlavná street.
I need a doctor!

theft-158.speaker: dispatcher
theft-158.text: Dobre. Policajná hliadka príde za päť minút. Zostante na mieste.
theft-158.translation: Good. A police patrol will arrive in five minutes. Stay where you are.
theft-158.wrongAnswerResponse: Dovidenia je neskôr — zostante na mieste, prosím!
theft-158.wrongAnswerTranslation: Goodbye is later — please stay where you are!

choices.translation: Thank you. I will stay here.
Alright. Can I describe the thief?
Goodbye!

theft-158.speaker: dispatcher
theft-158.text: Výborne. Hliadka je na ceste. Dovidenia.
theft-158.translation: Excellent. The patrol is on the way. Goodbye.

injury-155.speaker: dispatcher
injury-155.text: Záchranná služba, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
injury-155.translation: Ambulance service, good day. What happened?
injury-155.wrongAnswerResponse: Ukradli vám niečo? To je polícia — 158. Čo sa stalo zdravotne?
injury-155.wrongAnswerTranslation: Was something stolen? That is police — 158. What happened medically?

choices.text: Niekto je zranený! Cyklista zrazil chodca na Obchodnej!
choices.translation: Someone is injured! A cyclist hit a pedestrian on Obchodná!

choices.text: Je to núdza! Muž leží na zemi a nehýbe sa!
choices.translation: It's an emergency! A man is lying on the ground and not moving!
They stole my wallet!

injury-155.speaker: dispatcher
injury-155.translation: I understand. Where exactly are you?
injury-155.wrongAnswerResponse: Dobrú noc? Je deň! Kde ste — adresa alebo ulica?
injury-155.wrongAnswerTranslation: Good night? It is daytime! Where are you — address or street?

choices.text: Som na Obchodnej ulici, pri čísle pätnásť.
choices.translation: I am on Obchodná street, near number fifteen.
Obchodná street — near the tram stop.
Good night!

injury-155.speaker: dispatcher
injury-155.text: Sanitka je na ceste — päť minút. Nedotýkajte sa zraneného. Zostante pri ňom.
injury-155.translation: The ambulance is on the way — five minutes. Do not touch the injured person. Stay with them.
injury-155.wrongAnswerResponse: Nie — zostante pri ňom! Sanitka príde čoskoro.
injury-155.wrongAnswerTranslation: No — stay with them! The ambulance is coming soon.

choices.translation: Alright. I will stay with him. Thank you.

choices.text: Rozumiem. Dýcha — ale je v bezvedomí.
choices.translation: I understand. He is breathing — but unconscious.
Goodbye, I am leaving.

injury-155.speaker: dispatcher
injury-155.text: Výborne. Pošlite záchranku — sanitka príde čoskoro. Dovidenia.
injury-155.translation: Excellent. Ambulance dispatched — it will arrive soon. Goodbye.

fire-150.speaker: dispatcher
fire-150.text: Hasiči, dobrý deň. Kde je požiar?
fire-150.translation: Fire brigade, good day. Where is the fire?
fire-150.wrongAnswerResponse: Hasiči riešia požiare — nie krádeže. Kde presne horí?
fire-150.wrongAnswerTranslation: Fire brigade handles fires — not theft. Where exactly is the fire?

choices.text: Je tu požiar! Horí byt na druhom poschodí!
choices.translation: There is a fire! An apartment on the second floor is burning!

choices.text: Požiar v bytovom dome! Vidím plameň a dym!
choices.translation: Fire in an apartment building! I can see flames and smoke!
My bag was stolen!

fire-150.speaker: dispatcher
fire-150.wrongAnswerResponse: Meno neskôr — adresa teraz! Kde presne horí?
fire-150.wrongAnswerTranslation: Name later — address now! Where exactly is the fire?

choices.translation: Nobelova street twelve, Bratislava.
Štefánikova eight — near the centre!
My name is Martin.

fire-150.speaker: dispatcher
fire-150.text: Hasiči idú. Okamžite evakuujte budovu! Nevolajte výťah!
fire-150.translation: Fire brigade is coming. Evacuate the building immediately! Do not use the lift!
fire-150.wrongAnswerResponse: Nie — evakuujte budovu teraz! Hasiči prídu čoskoro.
fire-150.wrongAnswerTranslation: No — evacuate the building now! Fire brigade is coming soon.

choices.translation: I understand. I am going to warn the neighbors. Thank you!

choices.text: Dobre. Sú tu starí ľudia — pomôžete im?
choices.translation: Alright. There are elderly people here — will you help them?
Alright, I am taking the lift.

fire-150.speaker: dispatcher
fire-150.text: Hasiči sú na ceste. Choďte von — ihneď! Dovidenia.
fire-150.translation: Fire brigade is on the way. Go outside — immediately! Goodbye.

multi-112.speaker: dispatcher
multi-112.text: Linka 112, dobrý deň. Čo sa stalo?
multi-112.wrongAnswerResponse: Parkujete? To je mestská polícia — 156. Čo sa stalo na ceste?
multi-112.wrongAnswerTranslation: Are you parked? That is city police — 156. What happened on the road?

choices.text: Nehoda na diaľnici! Auto horí a sú tu zranení!
choices.translation: Accident on the highway! A car is on fire and there are injured people!

choices.text: Je to núdza! Hromadná nehoda — požiar aj zranení!
choices.translation: It's an emergency! Mass accident — fire and injured people!
A car is blocking the parking lot.

multi-112.speaker: dispatcher
multi-112.text: Posielame všetky záchranné zložky. Adresa alebo diaľnica — ktorý úsek?
multi-112.translation: We are dispatching all emergency services. Address or highway — which section?
multi-112.wrongAnswerResponse: Meno neskôr — kde presne je nehoda? Ktorá diaľnica?
multi-112.wrongAnswerTranslation: Name later — where exactly is the accident? Which highway?

choices.text: Diaľnica D1 — za Bratislavou smer Trnava, kilometer dvadsať.
choices.translation: Highway D1 — past Bratislava towards Trnava, kilometre twenty.

choices.text: D2 pri Lamači — veľká zrážka, asi päť áut.
choices.translation: D2 near Lamač — big collision, about five cars.
My name is Peter Novák.

multi-112.speaker: dispatcher
multi-112.text: Dobre. Hasiči, záchranná služba a polícia idú. Zostante v bezpečnej vzdialenosti.
multi-112.translation: Good. Fire brigade, ambulance and police are on their way. Stay at a safe distance.
multi-112.wrongAnswerResponse: Nie — zostante v bezpečí! Pomoc príde čoskoro.
multi-112.wrongAnswerTranslation: No — stay safe! Help is coming soon.

choices.translation: I understand. I am stopping traffic. Thank you!
Alright. I am going to help the injured — carefully.
Goodbye, I am leaving.

multi-112.speaker: dispatcher
multi-112.text: Všetky záchranné zložky sú na ceste. Ďakujeme za váš zásah. Dovidenia.
multi-112.translation: All emergency services are on the way. Thank you for your intervention. Goodbye.

parking-156.speaker: dispatcher
parking-156.text: Mestská polícia, dobrý deň. Čím môžem pomôcť?
parking-156.translation: City police, good day. How can I help?
parking-156.wrongAnswerResponse: Požiar? To sú hasiči — 150! Čo potrebujete od mestskej polície?
parking-156.wrongAnswerTranslation: Fire? That is the fire brigade — 150! What do you need from city police?

choices.text: Dobrý deň. Auto blokuje vjazd do mojej budovy tri hodiny.
choices.translation: Good day. A car has been blocking the entrance to my building for three hours.

choices.text: Prepáčte — sused parkuje pred vchodom. Nikto neotvára dvere.
choices.translation: Excuse me — a neighbor is parked in front of the entrance. Nobody is answering the door.
There is a fire here!

parking-156.speaker: dispatcher
parking-156.text: Rozumiem. Aká je adresa a evidenčné číslo auta?
parking-156.translation: I understand. What is the address and the car registration number?
parking-156.wrongAnswerResponse: Záchranku? Nikto nie je zranený — potrebujem adresu a ŠPZ auta.
parking-156.wrongAnswerTranslation: Ambulance? Nobody is injured — I need the address and the car plate.

choices.text: Nobelova dvanásť. ŠPZ — neviem prečítať dobre.
choices.translation: Nobelova twelve. Plate — I cannot read it well.

choices.text: Štefánikova osem. Auto je červené, ŠPZ BA123AB.
choices.translation: Štefánikova eight. The car is red, plate BA123AB.
Call an ambulance!

parking-156.speaker: dispatcher
parking-156.text: Dobre. Hliadka príde do tridsiatich minút. Máte telefónne číslo?
parking-156.translation: Good. A patrol will arrive within thirty minutes. Do you have a phone number?
parking-156.wrongAnswerResponse: Hasiči? Nie je tu požiar! Môžem dostať vaše telefónne číslo?
parking-156.wrongAnswerTranslation: Fire brigade? There is no fire! Can I have your phone number?

choices.text: Áno — nula deväťsto päťdesiat, dvesto desať.
choices.translation: Yes — zero nine hundred fifty, two hundred ten.
Yes, I will send an SMS with the number.
Call the fire brigade!

parking-156.speaker: dispatcher
parking-156.translation: Excellent. A patrol will come shortly. Goodbye.
